name: 沈词

appearance.face: 俊美如玉，清冷疏离，五官端正
appearance.distinguishing_features: 冷如冰湖的黑眸，偶尔透出琥珀光泽

visual_reference: handsome tall Chinese scholar-official in dark scholar robes, jade-like pale skin, cold piercing black eyes with subtle amber glint, refined features, long black hair tied with jade crown, aloof elegant posture, highly detailed 8k
visual_prompt_negative: smiling warmly, casual modern wear, beard, heavy emotion on face
personality: 清冷端方、尖锐刻薄、情感压抑却深情隐忍
desire: 保护青梅陆姝仪，后转为挽回妻子高令宁与女儿
flaw: 易误会他人、情感表达生硬、死要面子
arc: 从冷待算计到深爱觉醒，死缠烂打求复合
scene_presence: 与女主对峙的主要对手，从提亲到江南夜爬床，全程出现

relationships.dynamic: 恨意与爱意交织，最终痴缠
兄妹情谊被误会为恋情
